# August Solar

> Residential solar panel and battery storage installation for homeowners across North Carolina. Power your home by day. Battery storage keeps the life you love running by night.

August Solar installs residential solar energy systems including solar panels and battery storage. We serve homeowners in North Carolina, primarily in the Raleigh-Durham metro and surrounding communities.

## About August Solar

- **Founded**: North Carolina-based solar contractor
- **Experience**: 20+ years of combined installation experience
- **Specialties**: Solar panel installation, battery storage systems, system monitoring, maintenance
- **Service area**: North Carolina — Raleigh, Durham, Chapel Hill, Cary, Wake Forest, Apex, Fuquay-Varina, and surrounding areas
- **BBB**: Accredited business

## Services

- **Solar Panel Installation**: Custom residential solar system design and installation using premium monocrystalline panels. Full permitting, utility interconnection, and inspection management.
- **Battery Storage**: Home battery systems (Tesla Powerwall, Enphase IQ Battery, Franklin WH, Generac PWRcell) for energy independence, outage protection, and time-of-use optimization.
- **System Monitoring**: Real-time production and consumption monitoring via mobile app. Back-end monitoring by August Solar team.
- **Maintenance & Support**: Annual maintenance plans, priority service, inverter health checks, and battery performance testing.

## Core Value Propositions

1. **Day + Night coverage**: Solar generates during daylight hours. Battery storage takes over at dusk — lights, EV charging, appliances, and whole-home backup continue uninterrupted.
2. **No subcontractors**: All installations done by August Solar employees, covered by our workmanship warranty.
3. **Honest assessments**: We tell homeowners when solar is not the right fit for their home before they spend money.
4. **25-year support**: We remain the homeowner's point of contact for the full system life.

## Certifications

- NABCEP Certified Installers

- Tesla Powerwall Certified Installer
- Enphase Platinum Installer
- SolarEdge Preferred Installer
- Franklin Electric Certified
- BBB Accredited Business
- Fully bonded and insured

## Frequently Asked Questions

**How much does solar installation cost?**
System cost depends on size, roof orientation, and local incentives. Most NC homeowners see payback in 6–10 years with 25+ years of savings. A free in-home assessment provides a specific number.

**Is battery storage necessary?**
Without storage, solar shuts off during grid outages even if the sun is shining. Storage enables true energy independence and keeps the home running 24/7 on stored solar.

**How long does installation take?**
Most residential installs complete in one day. Permitting and utility interconnection approval takes 3–8 weeks.

**What happens during a power outage?**
Solar-only systems shut down during outages for grid safety. A battery system switches to backup power automatically in milliseconds.

**What warranties are included?**
25-year panel production warranty, 10–12 year inverter warranty, battery manufacturer warranty, and August Solar workmanship warranty on all installation labor.
